title: User Registration Success
description: Verify that a new user can register successfully by providing valid credentials and selecting an educational goal.

steps.description: Navigate to the signup page
Fill in valid username, email, password, and select an educational goal (Hifz, Tajweed or Tafseer)
Submit the registration form
Confirm the account is created successfully and user is redirected to onboarding or dashboard

title: User Registration Input Validation
description: Verify registration form handles invalid inputs such as empty fields, invalid email, weak password, and missing educational goal selection.

steps.description: Navigate to the signup page
Attempt to submit the form with empty required fields
Verify validation errors appear for empty fields
Input invalid email format and weak password
Submit the form
Verify appropriate error messages for email format and password strength
Fill form correctly but do not select an educational goal
Try submitting again
Verify that user is prompted to choose an educational goal

title: User Login Success
description: Verify user is able to login successfully with valid credentials.

steps.description: Navigate to login page
Input valid username/email and password
Click login button
Confirm user is authenticated and redirected to respective dashboard

title: User Login Failure Invalid Credentials
description: Verify login fails and shows error with incorrect username or password.

steps.description: Navigate to login page
Input invalid username/email or password
Click login button
Verify error message indicating login failure is displayed

title: Teacher Creates a New Teaching Session
description: Verify that a teacher can create a new teaching session with valid details.

steps.description: Login as teacher and navigate to Teacher Sessions Management page
Click on 'Create New Session' button
Fill in all required session details such as date, time, student(s), and topic
Submit the session creation form
Confirm session is listed in the teacher's sessions overview and details are correct

title: Teacher Edits and Deletes Session
description: Verify that a teacher can edit session details and delete a session successfully.

steps.description: Login as teacher and navigate to Teacher Sessions page
Select an existing session to edit
Modify session details and save changes
Verify updated session details are saved correctly
Delete the same session
Verify that session is removed from the list

title: Teacher Creates and Assigns Homework
description: Verify that a teacher can create homework assignments and assign them to students.

steps.description: Login as teacher and navigate to Teacher Homework Management page
Click on 'Create Homework' button
Enter homework details and select student(s) to assign
Submit the homework assignment
Confirm that the new homework appears in the students’ homework list

title: Teacher Edits and Deletes Homework
description: Verify teacher can update or delete existing homework assignments.

steps.description: Login as teacher and navigate to Teacher Homework page
Select an existing homework to edit
Modify the homework details and save changes
Verify the updated homework details are displayed correctly
Delete the homework
Confirm the homework is removed from the list

title: Student Views and Completes Homework
description: Verify that students can view assigned homework and mark it as completed interactively.

steps.description: Login as student and navigate to Student Homework page
Verify assigned homework is listed with correct details
Open a homework item and follow interactive steps if applicable
Mark homework as completed
Confirm homework status updates to completed and progress is reflected

title: Student Views Upcoming Sessions
description: Verify that students can view a list of their upcoming sessions with teachers on their dashboard and sessions page.

steps.description: Login as student and navigate to Student Dashboard
Verify upcoming sessions are displayed accurately with correct date, time, and teacher info
Navigate to Student Sessions page
Confirm the sessions list matches the dashboard and supports pagination or filtering if applicable

title: Direct Messaging Between Teacher and Student
description: Verify that teachers and students can send and receive messages instantly and reliably via direct messaging system.

steps.description: Login as a teacher and open messaging interface
Send a message to a student
Confirm message is sent and appears in conversation history
Login as the student and check received messages
Verify the message from teacher is received and displayed immediately

title: Toast Notification Display
description: Verify toast notifications appear appropriately on user actions such as success, error, or info events.

steps.description: Perform an action like successful login, homework submission, or session creation
Confirm a toast notification appears with correct message and disappears after a suitable time
Trigger an error scenario e.g. invalid form submission
Verify an error toast notification is displayed clearly informing the user

title: User Profile Update Securely
description: Verify that both teachers and students can update their profile information securely and changes persist.

steps.description: Login as teacher and navigate to profile settings
Edit profile details (e.g. name, contact, educational goals) and save
Confirm changes are saved and reflected in the profile view
Logout and login again, verify details persist
Login as student and repeat profile editing steps
Confirm student profile updates are saved securely and persist after relogin

title: Data Integrity in Teacher Student Management
description: Verify that data shown in teacher’s student management page is accurate and consistent with backend data.

steps.description: Login as teacher and navigate to Teacher Students Management page
Verify list of students is complete and accurate with current progress stats
Change a student’s progress or status in backend
Refresh or reload the page
Confirm the UI reflects the updated student data immediately

title: React Components and Hooks Integration Validation
description: Verify that custom React hooks for sessions, students, homework, and messages fetch and update data correctly with Firebase/Supabase

steps.description: Load Teacher Sessions page and validate sessions data populated via useSessions hook
Sessions list matches database backend
Load Teacher Students page and validate student data fetched by useStudents hook
Student data is accurate and updates are reflected in UI
Load Teacher Homework page and check homework data integration with useHomework hook
Homework data displayed corresponds to backend state
Open messaging interface and verify messages update dynamically using useMessages hook
Messages flow correctly with backend in near real-time

title: Secure Authentication and Authorization Flow
description: Verify that only authenticated users can access protected routes and unauthorized access redirects to login.

steps.description: Attempt to access dashboard or session management pages without login
Verify user is redirected to login page
Login with valid credentials and access teacher and student protected routes
User can access allowed pages and denied access to others (e.g. student accessing teacher-only pages)

title: Session Booking Edge Case Handling
description: Verify system behavior when booking sessions on boundary dates/times and with overlapping schedules.

steps.description: As a teacher, attempt to create sessions scheduled in the past
Verify system rejects past session creation with appropriate error
Attempt to create overlapping sessions for same student and teacher
Confirm system warns about conflicts and prevents duplicate bookings
Create a session on the earliest and latest allowable time boundaries
Verify sessions are accepted and correctly displayed

title: Responsive UI Rendering Across Devices
description: Verify that core pages such as Login, Teacher Dashboard, Student Dashboard render correctly on various screen sizes and resolutions.

steps.description: Open the application on different devices and screen sizes including desktops, tablets, and mobile phones
Confirm all UI elements are properly visible, aligned, and functional without layout breakage
Interact with menus, buttons, forms on each screen size
Verify interactive components respond correctly and navigation is intuitive on all devices
